scenario: claude adapter placeNew(component, conceptId) → on-disk relative path, per emitted type. Mirrors placement/all-types.json's byType shape. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
specSource: docs/design/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §2 (placeNew replaces TYPE_DIRS + resolveAssetPathFromName), §7 (claude row: 'AKM workspace layout IS .claude minus the prefix'), §6 (type-derivation conventions fix the owning subdir).
notes: SPECIFICATION golden — no claude adapter exists yet. Paths are component-root-relative POSIX strings (never absolute), mirroring placement/all-types.json's hard constraint.

The claude tool-dir layout IS the AKM subdir layout minus the prefix (spec §7): commands/ ↔ command, agents/ ↔ agent, skills/<name>/ ↔ skill. The one FIXED path is instruction → CLAUDE.md at the component root (the .claude root when mounted as a sub-component, or repo root — Claude Code writes CLAUDE.md at the project root; the spec models it at the component root).
skill placement is the DIRECTORY form <name>/SKILL.md (the item is the dir); the conceptId supplied to placeNew is the skill's directory concept id, so placeNew appends /SKILL.md.

instruction.name: CLAUDE
instruction.note: instruction placement is fixed at the component root (CLAUDE.md); there is one instruction file per component.

skillDirNameEqualsSkillName.note: The skill directory name equals the Agent Skills `name` (§4.5 hard rule: name == parent dir name), so placement is stable round-trip against recognition.
